summary: Completed testing of Bookvia FavoritesPage and related features. Fixed a critical bug where FavoritesPage was redirecting to login even when user was authenticated (auth context loading race condition). All backend APIs and frontend features now working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns {token, user} - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/users/favorites returns list with is_open_now, next_available_text, category_name - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/users/favorites/{business_id} adds favorite - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/users/favorites/{business_id} removes favorite - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/users/favorites with invalid business_id returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/users/favorites without auth returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: is_open_now field is boolean - PASSED
Backend: next_available_text format validation (Hoy disponible, Manana HH:MM, Dia HH:MM) - PASSED
Frontend: FavoritesPage loads with data-testid='favorites-page' - PASSED
Frontend: FavoritesPage shows grid with favorite cards - PASSED
Frontend: Favorite card shows business name, city, category badge - PASSED
Frontend: Favorite card shows Open/Closed badge (Abierto/Cerrado) - PASSED
Frontend: Favorite card shows next_available_text (e.g., 'Manana 10:00') - PASSED
Frontend: Favorite card has remove button (Trash2 icon) - PASSED
Frontend: Favorite card has 'Reservar' button linking to business profile - PASSED
Frontend: FavoritesPage empty state shows heart icon and 'Explorar negocios' button - PASSED
Frontend: Search page (/search?country=MX) shows Open/Closed badges on BusinessCards - PASSED
Frontend: Business profile page shows 'Horarios de apertura' section with grouped days - PASSED
Frontend: Business profile page shows Open/Closed badge in header - PASSED
Frontend: Sticky nav 'Horarios' link scrolls to hours section - PASSED

bugs_fixed.issue: FavoritesPage was redirecting to /login even when user was authenticated due to auth context loading race condition
bugs_fixed.fix: Added authLoading check from useAuth() - now waits for auth context to finish loading before checking isAuthenticated

critical_code_review_comments: FavoritesPage.jsx now correctly waits for authLoading before checking isAuthenticated (lines 19, 28-31)
GET /api/users/favorites correctly computes is_open_now and next_available_text from worker schedules (server.py lines 2106-2161)
BusinessCard.jsx correctly displays is_open_now badge with emerald-600 (open) or red-400 (closed) colors (lines 105-109)
BusinessProfilePage.jsx has getOpenStatus() function and BusinessHours component with grouped days (lines 206-341)
hoursRef in sticky nav correctly scrolls to hours section (line 383, 700)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing user 'cliente@bookvia.com' and businesses in MX country.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FavoritesPage bug fixed - was redirecting to login due to auth loading race condition. Now uses authLoading from useAuth() to wait before checking isAuthenticated. All favorites features working: grid view, empty state, add/remove favorites, Open/Closed badges, next_available_text. Country must be set to MX to see businesses. CORS warning for ipapi.co is expected (geolocation fallback).
console_warnings: CORS warning for ipapi.co/json - expected, this is a geolocation fallback service
ESLint warning: useEffect missing 'navigate' dependency in FavoritesPage.jsx - minor, does not affect functionality
